query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Vertical bands of warm color ranging from bright yellow to deep crimson, with narrow darker red stripes separating the wider orange and yellow-orange fields. Faint vertical streaks and minor dark spots appear within the color fields. The composition is entirely abstract with no discernible subject matter.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Vertical bands of warm color ranging from bright yellow to deep crimson, with narrow darker red stripes separating wider orange and yellow-orange fields. The image contains smeared, mushy textures with no fine detail resolving anywhere in the frame. Aggressively clashing hot hues of toxic orange and near-red create visual tension without balance. No subject is recognizable; the image functions purely through abstract color, shape, and texture rather than representation.
